---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# basics

```{julia}
# The operations themselves are also functions.
+(1, 2, 3)  
```

```{julia}
function fun(x::Float32, y::Float64; z=1.::Float64, w=2.::Float64)::Float64
    return x + y + z + w
end

fun(Float32(1.1), 1.2, z=1.3) # specify the type of input and output.
```
